query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.location, p.value, p.discoveryAttempts,
  DATE(p.lastDiscoveryAt) AS last_discovery,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0) AS total_contacts,
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT c.name ORDER BY c.name SEPARATOR '; ') FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' LIMIT 3) AS sample_named_contacts
FROM projects p
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.discoveryStatus = 'named_contact_no_email'
ORDER BY p.actionTier ASC, p.discoveryAttempts ASC
LIMIT 10;
command:

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.location, p.value, p.discoveryAttempts,
  DATE(p.lastDiscoveryAt) AS last_discovery,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0) AS total_contacts,
  (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT c.name ORDER BY c.name SEPARATOR '; ') FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' LIMIT 3) AS sample_named_contacts
FROM projects p
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.discoveryStatus = 'named_contact_no_email'
ORDER BY p.actionTier ASC, p.discoveryAttempts ASC
LIMIT 10;
